allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command python.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command node.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
